title: The Heist of the Century That Left Many Questions

scenes.text: Seven million euros and no one in custody.
It took place in Paris, at a high-end jewelry store.
In 2010, sophisticated thieves made off with priceless diamonds.
Despite extensive investigations, the culprits were never found.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED HEIST

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Paris, France - 2010. A daring heist at a luxury jewelry store left thieves with seven million euros worth of diamonds, yet no one has been caught. Follow for daily cold cases!
